transcript.text:
Order #155~
[Let's eat some burgers] Thank you
[Just how many is this?!]
[Emergency!]
[What?!]
[State of emergency declared at McDonald's!]
[How many?!]
[A total of 17 burgers]
[Oh you know what's up...]
Hello everyone
I've been craving some burgers lately
So I came to my favorite burger place: McDonald's
I eat McDonald's at least once a week That's how much I love it
I wanted to have it warm and fresh this time
Let's head inside
[McDonald's] [Gubeundari Station DT]

It's been a while since I've been inside
Let's check out the menu
I really love their Bulgogi burger
Hello
I'll take 5 Bulgogi burgers,
1 Shushu burger,
2 Shanghai burgers,
Your new menu item: Cajun Cheese McChicken
1 regular McChicken,
I have 10 burgers total
Can you make 3 of them a meal?
Guys, start making 5 bulgogi burgers now
We haven't had anyone eat this much yet
[This is only the beginning...]
I forgot about the Snack Wrap That's a must here
I'll take 3 Shanghai Chicken Snack Wraps, please

You have Sausage Snack Wraps too? I'll take 1
Also 1 order of Cheese Sticks
Order #155~
Thank you~
[A lot to carry for 1 person...]
It's all falling out
I'm off for today, but I've been waiting
[Wish granted]
It's all out Looks delicious
What to start with first? Cheese stick of course
These need to be eaten fresh
That's so tasty!
Don't get this delivered It's the best fresh
McDonald's has the best fries when they're fresh
I eat McDonald's for the fries
I eat McDonald's very often

There's a potato shortage because of covid
So they only have it early in the morning or sometimes they don't have it at all
I'm sad every time they're out
You have to come early for these
Delicious
McSpicy Shanghai Burger
Look at that chicken
This is very addicting
Tasty
The chicken can feel a little dry sometimes Almost like a nugget
It's like that
But it's very addicting
Almost like an artificial flavoring addiction
[Not saying that this is artificial food]
So good
I think coke is the best when eating burgers and pizzas

Bulgogi! (marinated beef)
These aren't sesame seed buns
The bulgogi burger has its own distinct taste
The bun is chewy and tasty
Very soft and delicious
You already know the bulgogi sauce is good
This is my favorite item here at McDonald's
Snack Wrap
Sometimes I only order these Like 10 of these
I love them They're so good
Chicken and bacon wrapped with tortilla The sauce is very good too
Burgers are good too, but this is the best
You need to push the chicken down a little or the end will be left with just lettuce and sauce
[She's just pushing it in her mouth...]
This is so good
[Where's my chicken?]

This last bite is all lettuce and tortilla
Let's try their new item
Cajun Cheese McChicken
It's big
Comparable to the Shanghai burger
Tomato and sliced cheese inside
McChicken
It's good!
Strong cheese flavors
Compared to the Shanghai burger,
Shanghai chicken patty has layers
This feels more like chicken nuggets
Chicken nuggets are tasty
It's good with cheese
I can taste a lot of cheese
It also has this spicy cajun sauce

It's good!
This!
Sausage snack wrap
This can't go wrong
It looks delicious
So good!
The sausage is so juicy
People eat french fries with ketchup, but I don't eat ketchup
Just like how some people eat tomatoes and not ketchup, some people eat carrots and not steamed carrots
I can't eat ketchup
Shushu burger This is good too
There's Shushu burger and Shubi burger, but I personally like the Shushu more
I like the shrimp taste in this burger
Not spicy More like sweet
You can see the shrimp inside the patty
Real shrimp

Bulgogi burger again because I have a lot
How are the flavors so addicting?
They must've put drugs in here
McChicken
It's similar to the McChicken I just had, but
This is more simple
Chicken patty and cabbage
I like McChickens because I like simple burgers
[Unwrapping one as she chews]
Bulgogi sauce is the best out of all the sauces
[I can eat this all day...]
I feel bad for the editor every time
Having to listen to my burp
The fries are yummy
Another cup of coke
1 more bulgogi burger

[10 down]
Snack wrap!
I never get tired of these
Not as much as the burgers, but these do fill you up
[Except for her]
[Wow, that nuna...] (older sister)
[Thumbs up]
[Bye]
Next, next next
Shanghai burger
I ordered a hot beverage because it's pretty chilly today
[1 bite of the burger...]
[And a sip of hot coffee...?]
That's really not bad
Fries
I'm almost finished

I'd need to order more
What next?
1 Shushu Burger meal, I'll change it to cheese sticks, please
1 Sausage Snack Wrap,
1 McChicken Mozzarella,
1 order of Coke,
1 Strawberry Oreo McFlurry, please
[I'm shocked...]
[2nd round]
[17 total burgers and snack wraps]
I've never had this When did this come out?
[Released 2019. 10. 10] I never knew
This has ketchup?
[This is it for me...]
It's not ketchup
It's pretty big The chicken patty looks bigger than McChicken

It has cheese sticks inside
This is fantastic
This is a fried food party
It's not ketchup It's like a spicy & sweet sauce
What? When did this fall out?
[There's no escape]
[Is she really eating everything?]
She's absolutely incredible...
Another sausage snack wrap
Gotta eat this before it melts
I've had the regular Oreo McFlurry, but not the strawberry I wonder if it tastes good
Refreshing It's good
Almost like vanilla ice cream with strawberry syrup
Dessert isn't at the end of the meal It's in the middle
Neutralize the flavors And then off to the next round
It's cold

It got cold after eating this
A warm sausage snack wrap
Bulgogi burger is the best at McDonald's
[It's gotten dark already]
It got dark because I took too long
10th beverage
I wish I could drink as much as I can eat
Last one
My favorite
She ate all of that
-Can you do it? -No way
She's good at eating
[Backing up]
Just look at the drinks alone
[3,500 mL of Coke]
I'm astonished

Thank you
1 last bite
All gone
I'm not finished yet
Come out!
Put it for me
You will edit it in, right?
[Burps]
[Editor]
Come out!
It's magic
So good
There are so many ways to eat an ice cream
I like pushing it down into the cone
[To eat an ice cream-filled cone!]
[Finished]

Thanks everyone
[Today's meal] 17 orders of Burger & Snack Wraps 6 orders of Cheese Sticks 3 orders of Potato Fries 9 cups of Coca Cola 1 cup of coffee 2 orders of ice cream [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
